task_summary: SMFR-04: Persist seeker speed label from activation to impact. drawSeekerMoveCountOverlay() moved outside phase guard in BS_Battle; overlay iterates all active seekers using movementAllowance fallback when no path is recorded this phase.
final_test_outcomes: Tactical suite: 211 tests pass (0 failures). Includes 1 new behavioral test (testSeekerMoveCountLabelFieldsReflectPathAndAllowance) and 1 new source-contract test (testDrawSeekerMoveCountOverlayCalledUnconditionallyInBSBattle). GUI suite: 47 total, 37 pass (10 pre-existing failures unchanged, 1 new test testSeekerMoveCountOverlayRendersInAllBattlePhases passes). All SMFR-04 acceptance criteria verified.
